description: Conducted research at Direct Supply as a visiting researcher.
keyPoints: Researched transaction analysis anomaly detection using Polars for high-performance data processing.
Analyzed transaction data to identify patterns and trends.
Detected anomalous transactions through advanced data analysis techniques.
Created a system to unify disparate company names between organizations.

description: Offered data science consulting services to Foley & Lardner.
keyPoints: Developed cross-selling recommender systems that helped identify missed cross-selling opportunities across the firm's client base.

description: Served as a machine learning consultant for CoreMap.
keyPoints: Designed Markov guided ablative surgery prediction algorithm to predict the most efficient locations for ablative heart surgery (a minimally invasive procedure) given a specific atrial fibrillation pattern.
